chat.placeholder: Tell me what feels heavy or unclear right now…
chat.disclaimer: HexAstra may be wrong. Use its insight as a guide, not a certainty.
chat.welcomeSubtitle: You do not need the perfect question. Just say what feels unclear, heavy, or stuck, and HexAstra will help you see it more clearly.
chat.dragToProject: Drag here to create a project
chat.emptyProjects: Create a project and drag your readings into it.
chat.allReadingsInProjects: All your readings are in a project.
chat.readingsWillAppear: Your readings will appear here after each exchange.
chat.suggestion1: Help me understand what I'm going through right now.
chat.suggestion2: Is this the right moment to act in my situation?
chat.suggestion3: Why does this situation keep coming back in my life?
chat.suggestion4: What direction seems most right for me?
chat.voiceNotSupported: Voice recognition is not supported by this browser.
chat.birthDataModalHint: These fields are optional — but the more you fill in, the more precise and personal the reading becomes. Each piece of information allows HexAstra to respond to you as if it truly knows you.
chat.paywallResetText: Your discovery access returns on {date} at {time}. If you want to go deeper now, move to {label} to keep the thread and deepen your understanding.
chat.paywallUnlimitedText: Unlock {label} to continue without interruption and go deeper in your understanding.

home.heroText: Hexastra helps you understand your situation, cut through mental noise, and move forward with more clarity and confidence.
home.heroMicrocopy: You do not need the perfect question. Enter the chat directly, without a long form.
home.previewUser1: I've been going in circles for weeks. I keep hesitating between staying and leaving.
home.previewAI1: What stands out first is not a lack of ability to choose.
home.previewAI2: It is inner overload: you are trying to feel reassured before looking at what has already changed.
home.previewUser2: So the real issue is not only the decision itself?
home.previewAI3: Exactly. When the knot becomes clear, the right direction feels lighter.
home.problemTitle: When everything feels unclear, even simple decisions become heavy.
home.problemCopy: You replay the same conversation in your head. You weigh every option. You move forward, then doubt again. The most exhausting part is not always the decision. It is the fog around it.
home.problemCard1Text: You analyze everything without ever feeling that the subject is really settled.
home.problemCard2Text: Every possibility seems reasonable, so nothing truly moves.
home.problemCard3Text: When emotion, pressure, and doubt blend together, it becomes hard to see what matters.
home.solutionTitle: Hexastra brings your situation back to what is clear.
home.solutionCopy: You describe what you are going through. Hexastra analyzes the whole picture. Then you receive a direct, structured insight you can use. No more noise. No theory to decode. Just a better understanding of what is happening and what direction makes sense now.
home.step1Text: Explain what is blocking you, what decision you are facing, or what tension you are feeling.
home.step2Text: The system identifies the dynamics, the pressure points, and what matters most.
home.step3Text: You get a concise reading with a practical angle to move forward.
home.valueCopy: Hexastra does not fill your mind. It clears it.
home.benefit1Text: See what is really happening beneath the surface.
home.benefit2Text: Move forward with more confidence and less hesitation.
home.benefit3Text: Put accurate words on what you are feeling.
home.benefit4Text: Step out of the mental loops that wear you down.
home.benefit5Text: Feel centered again, even when the situation is shaking you.
home.benefit6Text: No abstract concepts. A response you can apply.
home.diffTitle: A direct answer, not a tool to decode.
home.diffCopy: Most tools ask you to learn their method before they help you. Hexastra does the opposite: it starts from your situation and brings you back to what matters.
home.diffQuote: You don't need to understand the system. Only your situation.
home.diffCard1Text: You do not have to select a method or understand how it works.
home.diffCard2Text: You receive a clear, structured reading built for decisions.
home.diffCard3Text: What you really get is more direction.
home.socialTitle: When clarity returns, everything feels lighter.
home.testimonial1Quote: I felt understood in a few minutes. I finally had words for something I had been carrying for weeks.
home.testimonial2Quote: I was stuck between two choices. Hexastra did not drown me in ideas. I saw the real issue immediately.
home.testimonial3Quote: It feels calm, precise, and human. Not dramatic. Just clear, and that changes everything.
home.pricingTitle: Start free. Go deeper when the situation calls for it.
home.pricingCopy: The core experience stays simple: a clear, immediate, useful analysis. Paid plans unlock more depth, more precision, and more flexibility.
home.ctaKicker: Try it on a real situation
home.ctaTitle: If something feels unclear, start there.
home.ctaCopy: You do not need the perfect question. Start with what feels heavy, what keeps coming back, or what is still stuck. Hexastra helps you see it clearly.
home.footerTagline: Hexastra. Your inner GPS for clearer decisions.

contact.title: A question? Write to us.
contact.lead: You can contact us for any question about HexAstra, your subscription, or simply to give us feedback.
contact.successText: We will reply as soon as possible, usually within 24 to 48 hours.
contact.error: An error occurred. Try again or contact us directly by email.
contact.asideResponseText: We usually reply within 24 to 48 h on weekdays.
contact.asideSupportText: For frequent questions, check our help center first.
contact.asideBillingText: For billing questions, please include the email address associated with your account.

support.title: How can we help you?
support.lead: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions. If you can't find what you're looking for, contact us directly.
support.bandText: Our team is available to answer all your questions.
support.faq1Q: How does a HexAstra reading work?
support.faq1A: You ask a question or describe a situation. HexAstra crosses multiple human observation approaches to offer you a clear reading of your situation, without jargon and without unnecessary complexity. The result is a personalized response that illuminates what you are going through.
support.faq2Q: What is the difference between subscriptions?
support.faq2A: The Free plan gives you a preview of the experience with a daily quota. Essential is suitable for regular use with full readings. Premium gives access to full readings without pace restrictions. Practitioner is designed for expert profiles or those who accompany others.
support.faq3Q: Can I cancel at any time?
support.faq3A: Yes, without commitment. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account space, without notice. Access remains active until the end of the current period.
support.faq4A: Yes. Your conversations with HexAstra are private and are not used for commercial purposes. Consult our privacy policy for all details on the processing of your data.
support.faq5Q: How do I access my reading history?
support.faq5A: Your history is accessible from the sidebar of the chat interface, once logged in. Each conversation is saved automatically.
support.faq6Q: Does HexAstra replace a therapist or health professional?
support.faq6A: No. HexAstra is a space for reflection and inner clarity, not a medical or therapeutic service. If you are going through a difficult situation that requires professional support, we encourage you to consult a specialist.

pricing.freeDesc: Try Hexastra right away, with no friction.
pricing.freeF3: Clear responses with a daily quota

pricing.essentialF3: More continuity to follow your situations

pricing.premiumF4: Ideal when you need to go all the way

pricing.practitionerF4: Designed for practitioners and expert profiles

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: HexAstra Coach is a life intelligence service developed and operated by Hexastra. Our mission is to offer a space of inner clarity to help you better understand the situations you are going through.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect only the data necessary for the proper functioning of the service:
privacy.s2I1: Account data — email address, identifier, authentication method (email or Google).
privacy.s2I2: Conversations — exchanges you have with HexAstra, stored so you can access them later.
privacy.s2I3: Technical data — IP address, browser type, pages visited, for analysis and security purposes.
privacy.s2I4: Billing data — processed by our payment provider (Stripe). We do not store your banking information.
privacy.s3I1: Provide and improve the HexAstra service.
privacy.s3I4: Contact you when needed in relation to your account.
privacy.s3Note: Your conversations are not used for advertising purposes or shared with third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.s4Intro: We may share your data with:
privacy.s4I2: Anthropic — conversation processing via the Claude API.
privacy.s4I4: Legal authorities — only if required by law.
privacy.s4Note: We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.s5Body: Your account data is retained as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, your personal data will be deleted within 30 days, unless legally required to be retained.
privacy.s6Intro: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy.s6I1: Access — obtain a copy of your data.
privacy.s6I3: Deletion — request the deletion of your account and data.
privacy.s6I5: Portability — receive your data in a structured format.
privacy.s6Note: To exercise these rights, contact us via the
privacy.s7Body: We use strictly necessary technical cookies for the service to function (session, authentication). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.
privacy.s8Body: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data: encryption in transit (HTTPS), restricted data access, secure hosting.
privacy.s9Body: This policy may be updated from time to time. In case of significant changes, we will inform you by email or via an in-app notification.
privacy.s10Body: For any questions regarding this policy or your personal data, you can contact us via the

cgu.title: Terms of Service
cgu.s1Body: These Terms of Service govern access to and use of HexAstra Coach, a personal and strategic analysis service accessible via hexastra.coach. By accessing the service, you accept these terms without reservation.
cgu.s2Body: HexAstra Coach is a conversational analysis and personal alignment tool. It allows you to explore a life situation, clarify a decision, or understand a personal dynamic. HexAstra is not a medical, legal, financial, or mental health service. The analyses produced are elements for reflection, not absolute truths.
cgu.s3Body: Access to the service requires creating an account via an email address or Google account. You agree to provide accurate information and maintain the confidentiality of your credentials. HexAstra Coach reserves the right to suspend any account in case of abusive use or violation of these terms.
cgu.s4Body: HexAstra Coach offers several access levels: Free, Essential (€4.90/month), Premium (€9.90/month), and Practitioner (€24.90/month). Payments are managed via Stripe and are secure. All subscriptions are firm. The 14-day withdrawal right applies in accordance with European legislation, unless the service has been fully used within that period.
cgu.s5Body: HexAstra Coach does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of the analyses produced for your specific situation. The generated content is informational and does not constitute professional advice. The user remains solely responsible for their decisions.
cgu.s6Body: The HexAstra Coach service, its name, logo, interfaces, and content are the exclusive property of its creators. Any reproduction, distribution, or commercial use without authorization is prohibited.
cgu.s7Body: The processing of your personal data is described in our Privacy Policy. In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your data.
cgu.s8Body: HexAstra Coach reserves the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Users will be notified of significant changes. Continued use of the service after notification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
cgu.s9Body: These Terms of Service are subject to French law. In case of dispute, the parties agree to seek an amicable solution before any legal proceedings.
cgu.s10Body: For any questions regarding these Terms of Service, contact us via the Contact page on the site.
